news.t: This ETF strategy could help risk-averse investors ride out wild market swings

holdings.infoBox: EFAA is an equity ETF with a total of 706 individual holdings. The top holdings are Invesco Premier U.S. Government Money Portfolio Institutional Class stock at 16.29%, ASML Holding at 2.62%, HSBC Holdings at 1.18%, Roche Holding AG at 1.04%, and Novartis AG at 1.00%.

overview.description: The Invesco MSCI EAFE Income Advantage ETF (EFAA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed, fund-of-funds, that utilizes equity securities and ETFs to mirror the MSCI EAFE Index. The fund also employs an options-based income strategy with equity-linked notes (ELNs) for upside participation and downside protection EFAA was launched on Jul 17, 2024 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: This ETF strategy could help risk-averse investors ride out wild market swings
data.text: Invesco senior portfolio manager John Burrello sees income funds that employ options-based strategies as a suitable approach.
